text:
,
Kadru, consorts of the Gods not mentioned already, and also mothers
of the Gods, may all these bathe thee I May the groups of Divine
Nymphs, the stars, Muhurtas (periods of 48 minutes), Fortnights,
Days, Nights, the three junctions, years, the Lords of the Day (the

Royal Ablution XLVI1I 419
Sun and other planets), Minutes, Seconds, Moments, Lavas (the
sixth part of a twinkling), all these and other auspicious divisions of
Time bathe thee I May the Sages wedded to the propagation of the
Vedas and engaged in penance, along with their wives and pupils
bathe thee ! May the celestials who always move about in aerial
chariots, groups of Gods, Manus, Oceans, Rivers, the great Ser-
pents, Kimpurusas, Vaikhanasas (anchorites), the great Brahmanas
(or Sages), Vaihayasas, the Seven Seers with their wives, the Fixed
Places (like Dhruva), Marlci, Atri, Pulaha, Pulastya, Kratu,
Ahgiras, Bhrgu, Sanatkumara, Sanaka, Sanandana, Sanatana, Daksa,
